title: Locked VPN account reset after failed sign-in attempts
summary: VPN reset requests require identity verification before any account unlock or password reset is queued.
recommended_actions: verify caller identity with an approved factor
route the reset request to access_management
notify a human if identity cannot be confirmed before the customer call

title: Standard onboarding bundle for a new hire
summary: Standard onboarding bundles should queue email and VPN provisioning together while preserving the employee start date.
recommended_actions: create a bundled onboarding task for email and VPN access
queue the standard bundle in the onboarding queue
track the employee start-date dependency in the ticket

title: Finance shared-drive access requires explicit approval
summary: Finance-drive access is approval-gated and must stay separate from the standard onboarding bundle until approval is recorded.
recommended_actions: split finance-drive access from the standard onboarding bundle
request explicit approval for the finance drive
hold privileged access until the approval record is attached

title: Branch-office shared printer outage affecting multiple users
summary: A shared printer outage affecting a whole team should be treated as a local support incident, not a single-user request.
recommended_actions: treat the issue as a shared-service incident
notify human support immediately when invoice printing is blocked
